competitors.aiSummary:
# Drift Protocol Tweet Summary

Drift Protocol faced a significant exploit requiring recovery efforts. The team is collaborating with security firms (Asymmetric Research, OpenSec) and secured ~$150M in partnerships with Tether, including a $100M revenue-linked credit facility. They're pursuing user recovery and protocol relaunch with USDT integration while identifying exploit-related parties on-chain.

tweets.fullText:
Interim Update

We recognize the impact this has had across our users and the builders who have integrated with us - many of whom rely on Drift as core infrastructure.

We’re actively working on next steps and will share more once details are finalized.

Drift is actively working with @asymmetric_re, and @osec_io to consolidate a coordinated recovery plan.
